channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Trump threatens more tariffs on China as global markets shudder over how much pain economy can take
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Undeterred by a panicked stock market, President Donald Trump threatened additional tariffs on China on Monday, raising fresh concerns that his drive to rebalance the global economy could intensify a financially destructive trade war.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Billie Jean King immortalized in bronze with star on Hollywood Walk of Fame
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Billie Jean King became the first woman to receive a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in the new sports entertainment category on Monday and she was joined by friends Magic Johnson and Oscar-winning actor Jamie Lee Curtis.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Xander Schauffele is on the mend and motivated as ever at the Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Two majors made Xander Schauffele believe he was capable of winning them all. Two months out of golf with a rib injury is putting that belief to the test. Schauffele is more than capable of winning the Masters.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Maine sues Trump admin over funding freeze for refusal to keep trans athletes out of women's sports
item.description: Maine filed a lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Agriculture over a funding freeze the agency levied on the state for its refusal to alter its participation policy in sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gracie Hunt's mystery man creates buzz as she teases new romance
item.description: Gracie Hunt, the daughter of Kansas City Chiefs owner Clark Hunt, has teased a new romance with a mystery man on her Instagram as breakup rumors with Cody Keith swirl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: March Madness wraps in Florida-Houston matchup pitting tourney's best defense vs best clutch player
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — The national title game between Florida and Houston could come down to the NCAA Tournament's best clutch player against the country's best clutch defense. Walter Clayton Jr.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: UConn finishes season at No. 1 in AP women's basketball poll for first time since 2021
item.description: UConn capped its season at No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women’s basketball pol l on Monday, one day after winning its 12th national championship. The Huskies received all 31 votes from a national media panel after Geno Auriemma's team beat South Carolina 82-59 for the title.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL personality Annie Agar suffers black eye, concussion after scary fall
item.description: NFL personality Annie Agar revealed she suffered a black eye and a concussion after passing out in her bathroom last week. Agar said it was "not fun.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Justin Turner's error allows Fernando Tatis Jr. to score go-ahead run in Padres' 8-7 win over Cubs
item.description: Luis Arraez had four hits, Fernando Tatis Jr. scored the go-ahead run in the ninth inning when first baseman Justin Turner couldn't make the catch to finish a double play, and the San Diego Padres beat the Chicago Cubs 8-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Women's pool tournament championship features 2 transgender players after beating female competition
item.description: Two transgender pool players, who have dominated their competition in the past, faced off in a championship match in the United Kingdom on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: UConn is back on top of women’s basketball, winning its 12th national championship by routing defending champion South Carolina 82-59 on Sunday behind Azzi Fudd’s 24 points.
item.dc:creator: Dough Feinberg, WFLA, NBC

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Houston rallies to beat Duke in the Final Four, will face Florida for the NCAA title
item.description: The Cougars (35-4), who have never won a title, will play Florida on Monday night for the championship.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Duke's push for 6th NCAA title falls apart in unlikely late collapse against Houston in Final Four
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Up by double figures in the second half at the Final Four, closing in on the chance to play for yet another national championship, Duke was right where it had worked all season to be. What happened next was unforgettable, history of the most painful kind.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. is having an NCAA Tournament for the ages. Florida now just needs him to deliver one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls Head Coach Billy Donovan joins Carmelo Anthony, Sue Bird and others in Basketball Hall of Fame class
item.description: Carmelo Anthony and Dwight Howard are going into the Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, not once but twice. And LeBron James and Chris Paul are part of the group that’s headed to the Hall as well, even before their playing careers end.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, WGN 9

item.title: Cleveland's José Ramírez hits 3 homers and claims another piece of Guardians history
item.description: José Ramírez hit three homers and carried the Guardians to a victory Friday night. The slugger claimed another place in Cleveland baseball history in the process.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Giants home opener game Friday celebrating 25th season at Oracle Park
item.description: The San Francisco Giants are starting their 25th Major League Baseball season at Oracle Park on Friday with their home opener game against the Seattle Mariners. At 1:35 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: How Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club brought home Gold in Las Vegas
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Once high school volleyball season ends, several local high school athletes from all across the Western Slope come together to compete at the club level for the Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Curtis Granderson talks Cam Smith and Kyle Tucker, Will Venable and the Sox identity, torpedo bats
item.description: Cubs' top prospect Cam Smith is set to make his MLB debut this season, while the White Sox are off to a respectable start with a 2-2 record, and the Yankees have introduced torpedo bats, which are technically operating within the guidelines of the current rule book but are causing outrage among fans
item.dc:creator: Chris Boden, WGN 9

item.title: Milwaukee pays tribute to Bob Uecker in Brewers' first home game since his death
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — As the Milwaukee Brewers conducted a moment of silence before their home opener to honor Bob Uecker, one fan decided keeping quiet wasn’t the best way to pay tribute to the lovable loquacious broadcaster. “We love you, Ueck,” the spectator shouted.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, WGN 9
